title: Idhu Dhaanda Police
desc: Ramakrishnan, a police constable, is posted as a driver at Elathur women police station. He has to deal with the fiery sub-inspector, Arundhathi Varma, to save his job.

title: Pichaikkaran 2
desc: Sathya is a poor man in search of his sister, who has been kidnapped by human traffickers. However, an illegal brain transplant puts him in the shoes of a billionaire named Vijay.

title: Aranmanai 4
desc: Suspicious about his sister's death, Saravanan, a lawyer, tries to solve the mystery behind it, only to discover a mysteriously dark force at play.

title: Avan Ivan
desc: A benevolent landlord embraces two half-brothers as his chosen family, nurturing their dreams, but their lives take a perilous turn when they cross paths with a notorious cattle smuggler.

title: Adanga Maru
desc: Subhash, a daredevil officer, raises his voice against injustice when he comes across a few politically influential people. However, when his family is brutally murdered, he sets out to exact revenge.

title: Anjani Putra
desc: A businessman saves a policeman from a group of thugs. As a result, he incurs the wrath of a ruthless local gangster who is also an assassin.

title: Mannarkudi Veeran
desc: Siddhartha, a courageous District Commissioner, goes against a notorious local politician.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Shivan
desc: A man and a woman are in love with each other but on the day of their wedding, he ends up killing her. Soon, in prison, he realises the conspiracy behind the crime and plans to solve the mystery.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Kazhugu 2
desc: Two thieves get mistaken for huntsmen upon reaching a new place. So, they use the misunderstanding as an opportunity to take advantage and hide from the law.

title: Hyper
desc: Suryanarayana Murthy, is protective of his father, who is an honest government officer. However, when a politician causes trouble for his father, Surya strives to protect him.

title: Salaar Part 1: Ceasefire
desc: Just when the prince of Khansaar is about to rise to the throne, a plan of overthrowing him is exercised and only one man can help him retrieve power.

title: Prabhas
desc: Prabha prepares to meet Nandini, his childhood friend, at a reunion party organised by his father. However, things take a turn when Nisha, a gangster's daughter, falls in love with him.

title: Vinaya Vidheya Rama
desc: Facing a menacing criminal kingpin, Ram fights to protect his family. Soon, he embarks on a daring mission to topple the villain and dismantle his corrupt empire.

title: Oh My Ghost
desc: Gemini saidWhen a woman and her friends reach a small town, they uncover a link to a ghost and realise their grandfather left behind a secret legacy that changes their lives forever.
